title: One Person's Fraud Caused the Whole County to Be Blacklisted by E-commerce: A Man Used AI to Generate Pictures of Rotten Fruits to Get a Refund of 16,000 Yuan for Fruits and Was Sentenced to One Year in Prison
excerpt: According to CCTV News, the Hengshan County People's Court recently concluded a case where AI was used to forge images of rotten fruits to fraud e-commerce plat
content_html:
According to CCTV News, the Hengshan County People's Court recently concluded a case where AI was used to forge images of rotten fruits to fraud e-commerce platforms for "refund only" without returning the goods. In October 2025 to January 2026, local resident Tan Mou frequently ordered high-value fruits such as durians and cherries. After receiving the goods, he used AI photo editing software to create fake images of spoiled and moldy fruits and applied for "refund only" under the pretext of quality issues. Within four months, he placed more than 100 orders, with a total value of over 16,000 yuan.

75 mobile phones were used in the crime, and residents across the county were once blacklisted by the platform.

Tan Mou's actions went beyond personal gain. Multiple e-commerce platforms listed Hengshan County as a high-risk area, and residents of the county were temporarily unable to purchase durians and cherries on the platform. After the involved platform reported the case to the Hengshan County Public Security Bureau in January 2026, the police found through big data monitoring that multiple "refund only" orders had the same delivery address. After electronic data investigation and IP tracking, the suspect was identified, and 75 mobile phones used for the crime were seized from his residence, along with complete records of AI forgery and fund transfers. After obtaining the refund, Tan Mou did not return the goods but sold the undamaged fruits at a low price through Xianyu, WeChat Moments, and offline channels for profit.

Repeat offender received a heavier punishment, judge calls on platforms to enhance technical prevention

sentences.en: Repeat offender received a heavier punishment, judge calls on platforms to enhance technical prevention
sentences.zh: 累犯受重处罚 法官呼吁平台加强技术防范

content_html_zh:
据央视新闻报道，衡山县人民法院近日审结了一起利用人工智能伪造腐烂水果图像诈骗电商平台“只退款”不退货的案件。 2025年10月至2026年1月，当地居民谭某频繁订购榴莲、樱桃等高价值水果。 收到货后，他利用AI照片编辑软件制作了腐烂发霉水果的假图片，并以质量问题为由申请“只能退款”。 四个月内，他下了100多个订单，总价值超过16000元。

作案使用手机75部，全县居民一度被平台列入黑名单。

谭某的行为超出了个人利益的范围。 多家电商平台将横山县列为高风险地区，该县居民暂时无法在平台购买榴莲、车厘子。 涉案平台于2026年1月向横山县公安局报案后，警方通过大数据监控发现，多笔“只退款”订单的送货地址相同。 经过电子数据侦查和IP追踪，锁定了犯罪嫌疑人身份，并在其住处查获作案用手机75部，以及完整的人工智能伪造和资金转移记录。 获得退款后，谭某并未退货，而是通过闲鱼、微信朋友圈、线下渠道低价出售未损坏的水果以获取利润。

累犯受重处罚 法官呼吁平台加强技术防范
